steps.title: Identify the elaborating signal
steps.content: The passage establishes that the directors “love cats,” then immediately describes their creation of a cat video game. The second sentence doesn't contradict, interrupt, or offer an alternative — it provides a concrete example demonstrating their stated passion.

steps.title: Apply the signal to the choices
steps.content: ”In fact” introduces examples that reinforce what was just stated—here, their love of cats exemplified by their game. The other choices signal either contradiction (On the other hand, Nevertheless) or unrelated timing (Intermittently). That matches choice C — C is correct.
